character_dossiers.name: the captain
character_dossiers.biography: Participated in a council discussing mutiny, relied on Silver to manage the situation.

character_dossiers.name: the doctor
character_dossiers.biography: Noted the stagnant smell and warned of fever on the island.

character_dossiers.name: Long John
character_dossiers.biography: Commanded a boat, navigated the passage, and attempted to maintain order among the crew.

character_dossiers.name: Anderson
character_dossiers.biography: Commanded a boat and grumbled about the situation.

character_dossiers.name: the squire
character_dossiers.biography: Participated in the cabin council and asked about Silver's identity.

character_dossiers.name: Silver
character_dossiers.biography: Implied to be a key figure in managing the mutiny, described as anxious by the captain.
